$schema: Tool registry for CC Director. Single source of truth for all tools.
_ship: A tool ships in the installed product ONLY when "ship": true. Core is an explicit allowlist - general-purpose, reliable without a personal API key, and serving one of documents / vault / browser / comms / config. Everything else stays in the repo (buildable for dev) but is never bundled or shown in the Tools page. There is no longer a core/extras split.

categories.web-social: Browser automation, web crawling, and social media
categories.desktop-automation: Windows UI automation and AI desktop agent
categories.media: Image, audio, video, and photo processing
categories.data-utilities: Data storage, system info, and developer tools
